channel.title: NRIBeat — Daily Pulse for Indian Americans
channel.description: Immigration, AI, Cricket, Bollywood, and Layoffs — curated daily for the Indian-American community.

item.title: Bangladesh Beats India: Mustafizur's 5-Wicket Haul Changes Momentum 2026
item.description: Bangladesh pulled off a stunning upset over India with Mustafizur Rahman's 5-wicket haul. The victory marks a momentum shift in their series and shows Bangladesh can compete at the highest level. For Indian cricket fans in the US, here's how to catch the next matches and stay updated on India cricket scores.

item.title: MI's Big Loss to CSK: Jayawardene Points to Powerplay Collapse
item.description: Mumbai Indians' loss to CSK in IPL 2026 reveals a critical weakness: powerplay inconsistency. Coach Mahela Jayawardene identified that MI is giving away too many big overs in the opening six overs—a structural problem that needs fixing before playoffs. For Indian fans in the US, catch the highlights on Hotstar or YouTube without losing sleep!

item.title: Redwood Materials Layoffs 2026: What It Means for AI Jobs
item.description: Redwood Materials' COO retirement and VP departures signal wider clean-tech restructuring. Indian engineers should monitor their company's leadership stability, focus on niche ML expertise, and expect machine learning salary growth to flatten. Market is shifting from growth-at-all-costs to operational efficiency — start documenting your business impact now.

item.title: Arijit Singh's 'Laiyaan' 2025: Independent Music & OTT
item.description: Arijit Singh releases independent single 'Laiyaan' with Ruaa Kayy after stepping back from Bollywood. Available on Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube Music, and more. A major shift signaling how Indian artists are moving beyond film music in 2025.

item.title: IPL 2026 Orange Cap: Samson Climbs to No. 3, Kamboj Takes Purple Cap
item.description: Sanju Samson's climb to No. 3 in the IPL 2026 Orange Cap and Kamboj's Purple Cap reclamation after CSK's big win over MI signal shifting momentum in the tournament. These leaderboard moves matter for playoff positioning and individual performance trends as we enter the business end of the season.

item.title: Claude AI Degradation 2026: What Changed & How It Affects You
item.description: Anthropic revealed that Claude's recent performance drop was caused by changes to the model's training harnesses and system instructions—not a conspiracy. Indian engineers using Claude for code generation and system design should test ChatGPT alternatives and consider a multi-tool strategy while waiting for Anthropic's fixes.

item.title: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Holds Steady to July 15, 2014
item.description: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.

item.title: Nuwan Thusara Withdraws Lawsuit Against Sri Lanka Cricket 2026
item.description: Nuwan Thusara drops his legal battle with Sri Lanka Cricket, but the bigger mystery remains: will he actually show up for his IPL 2026 commitment with RCB? The franchise is keeping quiet on replacements, suggesting they're hoping he arrives soon. For Indian cricket fans in the US, it's another reminder of how off-field drama can shake up franchise seasons—stay tuned for updates.

item.title: Akshay Kumar & Vidya Balan's Kerala Film Schedule 2026
item.description: Akshay Kumar and Vidya Balan are reuniting after 15 years for an Anees Bazmee film, with the next shooting schedule happening in Kerala. The project is generating major buzz in Bollywood, and Indian diaspora viewers in the US should expect it on major streaming platforms like Netflix, Prime Video, or Hotstar once released.

item.title: AI Chatbots & Your Career: What the 2026 Regulations Mean
item.description: California is tightening AI chatbot regulations following a 2025 tragedy, creating new demand for compliance-minded engineers. Indian tech pros who learn AI safety frameworks and audit their tool stacks now will command 15-20% higher salaries and access better job opportunities. Your move: Start evaluating alternatives to ChatGPT (Claude, Gemini) and position yourself as compliance-aware.

item.title: AI Funding for Engineers: Securing Grants & Career Growth in 2026
item.description: Philanthropic AI funding is expanding in 2026, creating genuine alternatives to VC for Indian engineers in the US. Unlike venture capital, grant funding doesn't require equity, offers stable multi-year support, and comes with research credibility that boosts future salaries by 15–25%. If you have a research idea or want to build AI infrastructure, now is the time to explore foundation grants from organizations like Simons Foundation and OpenPhilanthropy.

item.title: Shanto Century Powers Bangladesh to 265: India Cricket Score Update
item.description: Shanto's brilliant century and Litton Das's comeback fifty helped Bangladesh post a competitive 265 in Chattogram. The 160-run partnership between these two was the turning point—once they got going, they controlled the chase. For India cricket fans in the US tracking this series, it's a reminder that solid middle-order batting can rebuild any innings.

item.title: CSK Signs Akash Madhwal to Replace Ayush Mhatre | IPL 2025
item.description: CSK have signed fast bowler Akash Madhwal to replace Ayush Mhatre, bringing the experienced MI net bowler into their IPL 2025 squad. This mid-tournament signing strengthens Chennai's bowling options as they push through the competition, offering Indian cricket fans in the US another storyline to follow in the franchise league.

item.title: Why Smart Engineers Are Ditching AI Coding Tools in 2025 [2026]
item.description: Engineers who aggressively adopted AI coding tools early are now stepping back. The issue isn't that the tools don't work—it's that outsourcing thinking to AI atrophies the skills that actually drive career growth. Use AI strategically for mechanical work, not for learning. Your irreplaceability depends on judgment, not speed.

item.title: AI Music Floods Streaming: What It Means for Your Tech Career in 2026
item.description: AI-generated music now comprises 44% of Deezer daily uploads—a sign of AI commodification accelerating across all technical fields. For Indian software engineers in the US, the career shift isn't about using AI tools, but building expertise in detecting synthetic content, managing AI infrastructure, and making architectural decisions AI can't yet handle reliably. Engineers who make this pivot command 12–18% higher compensation in 2026.

item.title: Nawaz Under Investigation: What India Cricket Fans Need to Know
item.description: Pakistani cricketer Nawaz faces ICC investigation after testing positive for recreational drug during T20 World Cup. The case could affect IPL 2025 squad compositions and sets precedent for international cricket's player conduct standards—critical timing as India prepares major series in 2026.

item.title: Haunted: Echoes Of The Past – New Bollywood Movie 2026
item.description: Vikram Bhatt's new supernatural thriller Haunted: Echoes Of The Past releases June 12, 2026—marking a major return to Bollywood horror after the success of Haunted 3D. The director changed the original title based on superstition beliefs. For US-based Indian diaspora, expect theatrical release followed by streaming on Prime Video, Netflix, or Disney+ Hotstar within weeks.

item.title: IPL 2026: Abhishek Tops Orange Cap, Malinga Rises on Purple Cap
item.description: Abhishek leads the Orange Cap in IPL 2026 after SRH's dominant win over Delhi, while Lasith Malinga climbs the Purple Cap rankings. For US-based Indian cricket fans, this means two must-watch players to follow in upcoming matches. Here's how to catch all the action live.

item.title: Bangladesh vs New Zealand ODI Series 2026: Chattogram Pitch Analysis
item.description: Bangladesh and New Zealand's ODI series decider at Chattogram features a flat batting pitch after spin-dominated openers, creating an entirely new contest. Both teams must completely recalibrate strategy as surface conditions dramatically shift, with aggressive batting suddenly favored over defensive technique. For US-based India cricket fans, this series demonstrates the critical importance of pitch adaptation—a skill crucial for understanding outcomes across all formats, from India vs Australia Tests to IPL 2025 franchise matches.

item.title: Claude Mythos: The AI Tool Reshaping Software Security in 2025 [2026]
item.description: Claude Mythos is an unreleased AI tool that finds bugs in massive codebases autonomously—and it's reshaping security engineering. Indian software engineers who learn Mythos now (via existing Claude APIs) will command 15–25% salary premiums and secure high-value security roles. The tool likely launches mid-2025; early adopters have a 6-month advantage.
